LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D. HEARING IS HELD. DEFENDANT ARGUES. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S NOTES) THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE PLEADINGS AND HAVING HEARD ORAL ARGUMENT RULES AS FOLLOWS: HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF ATHENA DRAPER. CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. ALL FUNDS HELD BY THE SHERIFF IS TO BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR ATHENA DRAPER EXCEPT FOR $100 DOLLARS WHICH WILL BE GIVEN TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR TOWARDS PAYMENT OF THE JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHALL PAY $50 A MONTH FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT) ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-29-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq. 415-680-5731 specially appearing for Plaintiff.
Athena Draper 925-338-0019 Defendant in Pro per.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Defendant Argues. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF ATHENA DRAPER.

Claim of Exemption is granted. All funds held by the Sheriff is to be released to the Judgment Debtor Athena Draper except for $100 dollars which will be given to the Judgment Creditor towards payment of the Judgment. Judgment Debtor shall pay $50 a month for payment on the Judgment. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2004 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
